Request Summary: Productized control-plane review loop fixture
Workflow Hint: repo-coding-task

lane: runtime-product-upgrade
- goal: execute one narrow coding task and close review findings through the runtime-native repair loop
- current phase: execution-ready
- current assets: phase spec / execution package / validation contract
- missing: execution result / review closeout summary

auto dispatch: yes
requires approval: no
review expectation: update the closeout-facing documentation before closeout
review expectation: rerun validation after repairing the review finding
